# Diet Swad

> Diet Swad is an Indian D2C healthy snacks brand based in Kolkata, West Bengal. All products are handmade, preservative-free, and priced at ₹499 with pan-India shipping. Run by Radiant Twins Enterprise.

## Products

All products are available to order at https://www.dietswad.in/order

- [Power Bites](https://www.dietswad.in/power-bites): Date and nut heart shaped energy bites. 11 superfoods, 7.5g protein per serving. No added sugar.
- [Royal Bites](https://www.dietswad.in/royal-bites): Roasted gram flour + peanut butter protein bites. 14.8g protein per 100g serving.
- [Peanut-Sesame Delights](https://www.dietswad.in/peanut-sesame-delights): 4-ingredient heart shaped energy bites with peanuts and sesame. 13.2g protein per 100g serving.
- [Millet Butter Cookies](https://www.dietswad.in/millet-butter-cookies): Sorghum millet (30.8%) and salted butter cookies.
- [Millet Coconut Cookies](https://www.dietswad.in/millet-coconut-cookies): Jowar millet, desiccated coconut, and oats cookies.
- [Millet Choco Cookies](https://www.dietswad.in/millet-choco-cookies): Dual millet (jowar + ragi) and almond flour chocolate cookies.
- [Roasted Cashews](https://www.dietswad.in/roasted-cashews): Plain roasted cashews. 2 ingredients only. 18.2g protein per 100g.

## Ordering

- All products ₹499 each, free shipping pan-India
- Order online: https://www.dietswad.in/order
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/918910725854

## Policies

- [Refund Policy](https://www.dietswad.in/refund-policy): Food products cannot be returned for hygiene reasons. Quality complaints handled case-by-case.
- [Shipping Policy](https://www.dietswad.in/shipping-policy): Pan-India shipping, 5–7 business days.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.dietswad.in/privacy-policy)
